cases: Prepare a read-only taskpack binding seed for the released symbol catalog under release_surface:owner. Use the default codex worker. Create a binding seed for the repo symbol catalog using the owner policy. Keep it read-only, use the default worker, allow only packages/adeu_agent_harness/src/adeu_agent_harness/taskpack_binding.py and packages/adeu_agent_harness/tests/test_taskpack_binding.py, and forbid internet plus multiple workers.

For release_surface:owner, emit a read-only taskpack boundary seed over the released symbol catalog with the default codex worker.
